_doc: Kaldheim (KHM) Draft + Collector recipes. The `draft` block is the original collation-derived recipe from data/_collation-facts/khm.json (The Collation Project) and is kept verbatim. The `collector` block was added from Wizards' official 'Collecting Kaldheim' article (https://magic.wizards.com/en/news/feature/collecting-kaldheim-2021-01-07). KHM (Jan 2021) is pre-Play-Booster, so there is intentionally NO play booster; Set Boosters are skipped per assignment. authoritative=true. Set composition: 101C / 80U / 64R / 20M. Sub-set codes: KHM = main set, KHC = Kaldheim Commander (the 'Commander rare/mythic' that can appear in the rare-saga slot), TKHM = tokens, AKHM = art series (not used; Collector ships a foil token, not an art card, in the token slot). Collector Booster = 16 (15 cards + 1 foil double-sided token): 1 rare saga/exclusive/Commander card, 1 foil snow basic land, 1 non-foil extended-art rare/mythic, 1 foil rare/mythic, 1 non-foil showcase uncommon, 1 foil showcase uncommon, 2 foil uncommons, 5 foil commons, 1 non-foil showcase/borderless rare/mythic, 1 foil showcase/borderless/extended-art rare/mythic, 1 foil token. Article pool sizes used to DERIVE weights (exact percentages were not published): extended-art 36 rares / 4 mythics with 'each rare shows up twice as often as each mythic rare' -> 36*2 : 4*1 = 72 : 4 = 94.7% rare / 5.3% mythic. Showcase/borderless non-foil slot pool '18 rares and 16 mythic rares', applying the same rare=2x-mythic frequency rule -> 36 : 16 = 69.2% rare / 30.8% mythic. Foil alt-frame final slot pool '54 rares and 20 mythic rares' (showcase + borderless + extended-art combined); split derived as 108 : 20 = 84.4% rare / 15.6% mythic, then apportioned across the three treatments by their relative pool sizes (extended-art 40 of 90 booster-fun = ~44%, showcase/borderless 50 of 90 = ~56%). Approximations: no dedicated 'snow basic land' filter exists, so the foil snow land uses basic_land (KHM's only basics are snow basics, so the pool is correct); showcase Viking-frame and borderless legends are modeled with showcase/borderless filters; the Commander-card variant of the rare-saga slot references KHC.

draft.tagline: 10 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 33% of boosters

collector.tagline: 15 premium cards + foil token · foil snow land · showcase Viking legends · extended-art chase

slots.label: Foil Showcase / Borderless / Extended-Art Rare / Mythic
